articles.title: Can permanent hiring weakness continue to weigh on staffing stocks?
articles.summary: Investing.com -- European staffing companies could face further pressure as weakening demand for permanent recruitment threatens revenue growth, margins, and earnings, according to a report from Morgan Stanley.

articles.title: Randstad Refocuses On Core Staffing With LTM Tech Deal And Partnership
articles.summary: LTM has agreed to acquire Randstad's technology and consulting services businesses across several European markets and Australia. The transaction includes a new long term IT services partnership between Randstad and LTM. The deal would reshape Randstad's operating focus and its role in the staffing and technology services sectors. For investors tracking ENXTAM:RAND, this move comes at a time when the stock is trading at €26.06 and is up 4.0% over the past week and 5.6% over the past month...
